goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'entrance fee', and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should depart from 'ely'.
The train should 'arrive by 11:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get phone number, entrance fee, and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on sunday and should depart from ely
The train should arrive by 11:00 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
